_about: Codebase map for AI navigation. Updated 2026-07-03 after mobile-first + i18n refactor.
name: Tarek Recolons — Portfolio (mobile-first, EN/ES)

stack.frontend: vanilla HTML + CSS + JS (no build step, no framework)

entry_points.css_layout: assets/css/base.css (mobile-first; desktop kicks in at min-width:900px)
entry_points.js_logic: assets/js/main.js (i18n + theme toggle + mobile nav + kit filter)

tarek_decisions: Pick real contact email (currently placeholder contact@tarekrecolons.com)
Decide hero photo: keep BTS / swap for portrait / drop background
Confirm bio voice: keep 1st person / change to 3rd person / add more
Decide on showreel: Vimeo/YouTube embed OR self-hosted (R2) — licensing dependent
Confirm or replace the 11 credits (currently includes all of them)
infra: Provision Cloudflare R2 bucket `tarek-videos` (paused: needs payment card on file)
Buy real domain tarekrecolons.com once brand confirmed
Wire OG image preview by sharing the URL on LinkedIn/WhatsApp

file_tree.assets/css/base.css: mobile-first layout + components. Desktop overrides in @media (min-width: 900px) blocks at the bottom.
file_tree.assets/css/tungsten.css: default theme: warm gold on dark; cinematic mood.
file_tree.assets/js/main.js: vanilla, ~250 lines. Modules: I18N (load + apply), themeToggle, mobileNav, langToggle, kitFilter, yearStamp.
file_tree.data/i18n.json: EN + ES translations for ~64 UI strings. Add new strings by adding data-i18n="key" to HTML.
file_tree.assets/images/hero-forest.jpg: BTS photo used as mobile-banner (above content) and desktop-overlay background. 535KB.
file_tree.assets/images/og-image.svg: 1200×630 SVG, shown when link is shared on LinkedIn/WhatsApp/Twitter.

deploy.auto_deploy: Cloudflare Pages picks up the change within ~30 seconds
deploy.rollback: Cloudflare dashboard → Pages → cinema-lighttech-portfolio → Deployments → click any past deployment → 'Roll back to this deploy'

i18n_quick_guide.add_string: 1) add the key to both 'en' and 'es' in data/i18n.json; 2) add data-i18n="key" on the HTML element
i18n_quick_guide.html_string: use data-i18n-html="key" when the value contains markup (e.g. <em>)
i18n_quick_guide.default_lang: set <html lang="es"> to force Spanish as page default (overrides browser detection)
